name: Benstock Dental Care
tagline: Gentle, personalized family dentistry in Sebastopol
seoDescription: Benstock Dental Care is the Sebastopol practice of Dr. Scott Benstock, DDS — general, family & cosmetic dentistry with gentle, personalized care

sections.heading: Comfortable family dentistry on Petaluma Avenue
sections.subheading: Dr. Scott Benstock and his team provide gentle, health-centered general, family, and cosmetic dentistry in the heart of Sebastopol.
badges: Led by Dr. Scott Benstock, DDS — doctorate
Decades of experience caring for Sebastopol

sections.heading: About Benstock Dental Care
body: At Benstock Dental Care, the focus is comfortable, health-centered dentistry with a strong emphasis on getting to know each patient. From routine cleanings and exams to cosmetic and restorative care, Dr. Scott Benstock and his team are dedicated to the kind of personalized, gentle care that turns a dentist visit into something you don't dread.

Dr. Benstock earned his doctorate in dentistry from Emory University and has spent decades building long-term relationships with Sebastopol families and patients throughout Sonoma County. He has pursued continuing education across Invisalign, sedation dentistry, laser therapy, periodontics, endodontics, oral surgery, and cosmetic dentistry, and is a member of the American Dental Association, the California Dental Association, and the Redwood Empire Dental Society
highlights: Led by Dr. Scott Benstock, DDS — doctorate in dentistry from Emory University (1984)
Decades of experience caring for Sebastopol families and patients across Sonoma County
General, family & cosmetic dentistry — cleanings, crowns, implants, veneers & more
Continuing education in Invisalign, sedation dentistry, laser therapy & cosmetic care

items.title: Cleanings & Exams
items.description: Routine preventive checkups and professional cleanings to keep your teeth and gums healthy for the long term.

items.title: Porcelain Crowns & Fillings
items.description: Tooth-colored fillings and natural-looking porcelain crowns to restore damaged or decayed teeth.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Replacing missing teeth with implants that look, feel, and function like your own.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Porcelain veneers and cosmetic care to brighten and reshape your smile.

items.title: Root Canals & Restorative Care
items.description: Root canal treatment, dentures, and partials to relieve pain and rebuild your smile.

items.title: Dental Emergencies
items.description: Prompt attention when a toothache, break, or other urgent dental problem can't wait.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Benstock Dental Care and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Led By Dr. Scott Benstock, DDS — Doctorate
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Decades Of Experience Caring For Sebastopol
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.body: Rooted right here in Sebastopol, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Rated 4.8 Stars By Patients Across Review
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.quote: Dr. Benstock was very thorough in finding the problem, discussed options with me, wasn't pushy, listened to my concerns and did a great job with a major cavity fill and a crown. He even called me later that evening after my appointment to make sure I was doing okay
items.author: Verified patient

items.quote: Dr. Benstock is highly skilled and patient oriented. I highly recommend him and plan to use his services as long as I am in Sonoma county.
items.author: Verified patient

sections.heading: Work with Benstock Dental Care
sections.body: Find us at 652 Petaluma Ave. Call (707) 823-5339 — we’re glad to help.
